name: Occupations
description: Edit the school of system prompt roles that shape new agents before they start work.
keywords: Pick the role prompt that should shape newly launched agents.
Use the custom occupation when the built-in researcher or engineer prompt needs project-specific instructions.
Check conflicts before overwriting AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or GEMINI.md.

access.label: Managed prompts
access.detail: Uses the local Occupations prompt store and syncs managed instructions into AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and GEMINI.md so Codex, Claude, OpenClaw, Gemini, and OpenCode sessions receive the same role guidance.

capabilities.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_AGENT_PROMPT_PATH
capabilities.detail: Path to the active Occupations prompt file for this session.

steps.title: Choose an occupation
steps.detail: Pick the role prompt that should shape newly launched agents.

steps.title: Edit custom guidance
steps.detail: Use the custom occupation when the built-in researcher or engineer prompt needs project-specific instructions.

steps.title: Review managed files
steps.detail: Check conflicts before overwriting AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or GEMINI.md.

agentGuide.summary: Use Occupations when an agent needs to inspect or explain the shared role prompt that will be injected into new sessions.
useCases: Check which occupation is selected before starting a new agent.
Inspect the managed prompt source and synced AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and GEMINI.md files.
Diagnose prompt sync conflicts without writing secrets or credentials into managed instruction files.

commands.label: Read current occupation
commands.detail: Shows the selected occupation, source path, and managed target files.

commands.label: Open prompt source
commands.detail: Read the active prompt file from the agent environment when available.

env.name: VIBE_RESEARCH_AGENT_PROMPT_PATH
env.detail: Path to the active Occupations prompt file for this session.
